title: plan
description: The planner agent's typed, phased plan. Items in the same phase run IN PARALLEL in separate worktrees against the same base branch — they must not touch the same files. Build-on and same-file relations MUST be expressed through depends_on: a released dependent's worktree is provisioned with its dependencies' accepted branches merged in, while a bare phase number alone sequences nothing at the git level.

summary.description: One paragraph: how the material decomposes and why this phasing is parallel-safe.

id.description: Git-ref-safe slug (lowercase [a-z0-9-]); it names the item's branch.

goal.description: One sentence the dev agent implements.

scope_out.description: Hard walls the item must never touch.

phase.description: 1 = no prerequisites; same-phase items run in parallel. Phase alone does not sequence files — use depends_on for any build-on or same-file relation.

depends_on.description: Ids of items whose MERGED output this item needs; the item's worktree is provisioned with those branches merged in, so it really starts from their work.

feedback.description: Always the empty string — the machinery fills it when an item cycles.
